final:
module top_module(
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] H_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] L_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Word" *)
  output[15:0] Y_o
);assign Y_o = {H_i, L_i};

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y_o <= 16'hFFFF;
    end
  end

endmodule
